enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song?

Shoot the Kuruvi is a playful and romantic song that expresses love in a fun and energetic way.

What is the plot context of the song in the movie?

In Jil Jung Juk, this song captures the light-hearted moments between the characters, enhancing the film's comedic elements.

Who are the singers and music director of the song?

The song features vocals by Anirudh and Siddharth, with music composed by Vishal Chandrasekar.

When was the song released?

Shoot the Kuruvi was released on November 13, 2015.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Shoot the Kuruvi, the lively beats and playful lyrics create an atmosphere of joy and celebration. The song serves as a delightful expression of love, perfectly fitting the comedic and romantic moments in Jil Jung Juk. With Anirudh and Siddharth's dynamic vocals, it evokes feelings of happiness and energy. This track is a perfect addition to any festive occasion, encouraging listeners to dance and celebrate life.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Shoot the Kuruvi from Jil Jung Juk is a vibrant celebration of love and joy, featuring an electrifying collaboration between Anirudh and Siddharth. With its catchy beats and playful lyrics, this song is sure to get you dancing. Dive into the infectious energy that makes this track a must-listen for any party playlist!

this song is for you my love.
I didn't mean to hurt you, no, no, no, I'm sorry.

She didn't give me a song, just a feeling. I forgot how to sing. Life is putting me in a tough spot.
We are the little birds.
